description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Enjoy music at the Citizen Activity Center!

Date and time: Sunday, July 5, 2026 (Reiwa 8), 2:00 p.m.–3:00 p.m.

Location: Hanno City Citizen Activity Center, Multipurpose Hall

Performers: Bell Époque

Program: Flute and piano ensemble

Capacity: 80 people

Application period: Starting Friday, June 12, 2026 (Reiwa 8)

Applications close when capacity is reached. If spaces remain available, entry on the day of the event is also possible.

How to apply: By telephone

Contact the Citizen Activity Center at 042-973-2626.

• A Tanabata exhibition will be held from Friday, June 26 to Tuesday, July 7, 2026 (Reiwa 8). Please visit at the same time.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/11274.html
summary: ℹ️ Citizen Activity Center event: Tanabata Concert
